hooks.command: cd ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} && TAG='[auto]'; PATH='${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH}'; case "$PATH" in *wiki/*|*CLAUDE.md|*TASKS.md|*inboxes/*|*agents/*) TAG='[wiki]' ;; *scout/*) TAG='[scout]' ;; *designer/*) TAG='[designer]' ;; *builder/*) TAG='[builder]' ;; *tester/*) TAG='[tester]' ;; *seller/*) TAG='[seller]' ;; esac && git add -A && git commit -m "${TAG} ${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH##*/}" -m "$(git diff --cached --stat | head -15)"
